kind: OP-11 A/B ship-scorecard (decision-grade, pre-computed for zero-lag ship once WP-0 lands)
hypothesis: Morning-trend VWAP-reclaim after a FAILED counter-trend VWAP break -> one causal with-trend entry/day ('failed counter-trend move' shape). Subtractive/structural-mimic of vwap_continuation (#1), NOT additive confluence.

deploy_config.account: Safe-2 = ATM; Bold = ITM-2 (strike_offset -2). PRIMARY scorecard tier = ITM-2.

data_coverage: last real-fill 2026-05-15 (data load capped at 2026-05-15; ~14d real-fills blind spot exists from 2026-05-29 to 2026-06-18 but is NOT reached by this run). ASSERTED last filled-trade date = 2026-05-15 <= 2026-05-29 (clean window).

STANDING_BAR.drop_top5_OOS_alone_L173: OOS n=18 with top-5 OOS days removed is not separately persisted by the harness; full-sample drop-top5 = $66.61 (positive). OOS-alone concentration is the WEAK point (see caveats).

independence_vs_edge1_L174.note: EVERY edge-#2 entry day is also a vwap_continuation (#1) entry day, SAME SIDE. Edge #2 is a same-side sub-pool filter of #1 (81 of #1's 158 days), differing only in reclaim-trigger timing + strike/stop geometry. Shipping it alongside #1 is NOT diversification; it re-slices #1's exposure into a subset (overlap with edge #4 = 45 days).

op16_7anchor_no_regression.verdict: NO REGRESSION (does not re-take J's losers)

anchors.2025-04-29_WINNER_Pside: edge2 fires C (opposite) -> no winner capture
anchors.2025-05-06_LOSER_Pside: edge2 fires C (opposite side from J's losing put -> does NOT take J's loser)

op16_7anchor_no_regression.note: Dormant standalone edge, not a J-edge replicator. It does not capture J's winners (different side / no-fire) but critically takes ZERO of J's losing-side anchor trades. Live engine + #1 remain the J-edge vehicle; #2 does not modify production anchor handling -> no regression to the live edge-capture score.

verdict_detail: ITM-2 clears all 8 coded gates on the clean (<=2026-05-29) real-fills window: OOS +$72.11/trade, 5/6 positive quarters, beats coin-flip null by +$101.89/trade, sign-stable -8% -> chart-stop-only, drop-top5 positive, n=76. SHIPS under OP-11/OP-22 standing authorization (validated + profitable). OTM-2 tier FAILS (6/8: G7 null + G8 truncation) -> ship ITM-2/ATM only, never OTM-2 (C29).
MANDATORY_CAVEATS_for_REVOKE_note: OOS-ALONE same-day null band: OOS per-trade ($72.11) sits BELOW the same-day/same-side random-entry null OOS mean ($90.12). The trigger beats the coin-flip null and the full-sample same-day null (mean+std) and clears every coded gate, but on the OOS slice alone the edge is largely DAY+SIDE selection (picking the right trend days/sides), NOT reclaim-trigger precision. This is the known soft caveat -> REVOKE note, not a ship blocker.

L174 NOT INDEPENDENT of #1: 100% same-side subset of vwap_continuation. Shipping #2 concentrates into a #1 sub-pool rather than adding uncorrelated edge. Net incremental value over already-live #1 is UNPROVEN here (the comparison '#2 sub-pool vs the rest of #1' was not run). Recommend treating #2 as a candidate REFINEMENT/overlay of #1, not a parallel independent allocation.
2026Q2 is negative (-$68.24/trade, n=6) -> the most recent in-window quarter is the worst; small-n but worth a REVOKE watch.
OTM-2 tier is NOT shippable (fails G7+G8) per C29 strike-tier non-transfer.
